questions.question: Every morning, David _______ to God.
questions.explanation: Present Simple (habits/routines). 3rd person singular adds -s.
questions.japanese: 「毎朝」=習慣。三人称単数は-sが必要。

questions.question: Yesterday, the disciples _______ across the lake.
questions.explanation: Past Simple (completed actions). Regular verbs add -ed.
questions.japanese: 「昨日」=過去の完了。「ed」で規則的な過去形。

questions.question: She _______ in the garden now.
questions.explanation: Present Continuous (happening now). Form: am/is/are + verb-ing.
questions.japanese: 「今」=進行形。be動詞 + -ing。

questions.question: Moses _______ the people through the desert many years ago.
questions.explanation: Past Simple - Irregular verbs. Lead → led.
questions.japanese: 不規則動詞の過去形。lead → led。

questions.question: The sun _______ in the east every day.
questions.explanation: Universal truth = always true, use present simple. 'Sun' = it, so -es.
questions.japanese: 普遍的真実は現在形。三人称なので-es。

questions.question: Last week, they _______ bread and fish to the crowd.
questions.explanation: Past Simple - Irregular verbs. Give → gave.
questions.japanese: 不規則動詞 give → gave。

questions.question: Right now, the children _______ songs of praise.
questions.explanation: Present Continuous (action in progress). are + singing.
questions.japanese: 「今まさに」=進行形。are singing。

questions.question: Paul usually _______ letters to the churches.
questions.explanation: Present Simple with frequency adverbs. 'Paul' = he, so -s.
questions.japanese: 「通常」=習慣。三人称単数は-s。

questions.question: Two thousand years ago, Jesus _______ in Bethlehem.
questions.explanation: Past Simple Passive. Jesus = was born.
questions.japanese: 受動態の過去形。was born = 生まれた。

questions.question: Martha _______ in the kitchen while Mary listened to Jesus.
questions.explanation: Past Continuous (background action). while = was working.
questions.japanese: 過去進行形。while = 〜している間に。

questions.question: She is reading _______ Bible.
questions.explanation: 'The Bible' = specific, unique book.
questions.japanese: 特定のもの（唯一無二）には the。

questions.question: He wants to be _______ good shepherd.
questions.explanation: 'A good shepherd' = one example of many, not specific.
questions.japanese: 不特定の「一つの」には a/an。

questions.question: _______ sun is shining today.
questions.explanation: 'The sun' = only one sun exists. Always 'the'.
questions.japanese: 太陽や月など唯一の自然物には the。

questions.question: They ate _______ apple from the tree.
questions.explanation: 'An' before vowel sounds.
questions.japanese: 母音で始まる単語の前は an。

questions.question: He is _______ honest man.
questions.explanation: 'Honest' starts with vowel SOUND (silent h), so 'an'.
questions.japanese: スペルではなく音で判断。h が無音なので an。

questions.question: _______ God created the world.
questions.explanation: 'God' used as name = no article.
questions.japanese: 固有名詞（名前）には冠詞なし。

questions.question: She found _______ coin that was lost.
questions.explanation: Specific coin (identified by 'that was lost'). Use 'the'.
questions.japanese: 特定されたものには the。

questions.question: He has _______ faith in God.
questions.explanation: 'Faith' = abstract concept, uncountable.
questions.japanese: 抽象的・不可算名詞には冠詞なし。

questions.question: There is _______ book on _______ table.
questions.explanation: First mention (a book) vs. specific location (the table).
questions.japanese: 初出は a/an、特定の場所・ものは the。

questions.question: _______ water in the river is clean.
questions.explanation: Specific water (in the river). Use 'the'.
questions.japanese: 特定の場所のものには the。
